title: cymbopogon familiaris
intro: Cymbopogon familiaris, also known as East Indian lemon grass or citronella grass, is a tropical grass species native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon familiaris include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of fever, colds, and flu. Herbal preparations of Cymbopogon familiaris include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its therapeutic properties.
